ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the song (e.g., Spotify track ID) */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "album_art" TEXT /* URL to the album art image */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average user rating for the song */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood or emotion associated with the song */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the song was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the song information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the artist's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* URL to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "album_art" TEXT /* URL to the album art image */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album contains explicit content */,
  "track_count" INTEGER /* Number of songs in the album */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "age" INTEGER /* User's age */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user information was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role (e.g., admin, data analyst, developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was last updated */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user followed the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_features" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "audio_feature_id" TEXT /* ID of the audio feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "audio_feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., play, like, dislike) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity (e.g., play duration in seconds) */,
  "rating" REAL /* User rating for the song during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was made */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., algorithm, user request) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
